creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Needs QA confirmation, in addition to review of following in changelog:

 * It is now possible to manually override the detection of SSE2 using the ARGON2_CFFI_USE_SSE2 environment variable (what is the behaviour of the port now, what do we want/need it to be s far as performance and compatiblity goes with respect to builds using package cluster) 

 * The dependency on enum34 is now protected using a PEP 508 marker. This fixes problems when the sdist is handled by a different interpreter version than the one running it. #48

 * Vendoring Argon2 @ 62358ba (20190702) (we shouldn't use vendored libs)
